rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's description as it accurately reads 'Arrearagia'. claude-haiku had 'Arrerages'. Both extractors correctly identified the row as a header with no monetary amounts, which was visually confirmed.

Both extractors agreed on and correctly identified all monetary values: 3 pounds, 0 shillings, 5 pence, and the 0.5 fraction (1/2), visually confirmed. claude-haiku's note on 'obole' for half-penny is a good detail.

Selected gemini-flash's description ('In Hewin Lodge') for accuracy, as claude-haiku had 'Folkstone — Lodge'. Both extractors agreed on and correctly identified all monetary values: 22 pounds, 1 shilling, 7 pence, and no fraction, visually confirmed.

Selected gemini-flash for its accurate description ('Judge') and correct pounds value (10). claude-haiku had 'Lodge' and misread pounds as 12. Both extractors agreed on and correctly identified shillings (14), pence (1), and the 0.5 fraction (1/2), visually confirmed.

Selected gemini-flash's description ('Aitoms') as it is a more plausible reading than claude-haiku's 'Morne.', though the script has slight ambiguity for 'i'/'o' as gemini-flash noted. Both extractors agreed on and correctly identified all monetary values: 0 pounds (blank), 10 shillings, 10 pence, and no fraction, visually confirmed.

Selected gemini-flash's description ('Hardy'), acknowledging the visual ambiguity with 'Hartley' noted by both extractors. Both extractors agreed on and correctly identified all monetary values: 2 pounds, 0 shillings, 2 pence, and the 0.75 fraction (3/4), visually confirmed.

Selected gemini-flash's description ('Kimber.') for accuracy, as claude-haiku had 'Kimbier.'. Both extractors agreed on and correctly identified all monetary values: 23 pounds, 12 shillings, 5 pence, and no fraction, visually confirmed.

Selected gemini-flash for its accurate description ('Busby. (Worley)') and correct identification of the fraction as 0.25 (1/4). claude-haiku had 'Bushy, Warley' and misread the fraction as 0.75. Other monetary values (25 pounds, 16 shillings, 0 pence) were agreed upon and visually confirmed.
